title: Fix gnss_emul test for native_sim/native/64
description: gnss_emul/src/main.c has two issues on native_sim/native/64: (1) pm_device_runtime_is_enabled undefined - likely needs CONFIG_PM_DEVICE_RUNTIME, (2) DT_ALIAS(gnss) not found - needs overlay or Kconfig for native_sim.
close_reason: Verified fix: test builds and passes on native_sim/native/64. Both issues resolved: (1) CONFIG_PM_DEVICE_RUNTIME=y provides pm_device_runtime_is_enabled, (2) native_sim_native_64.overlay symlink provides DT_ALIAS(gnss). Test passes all 6 assertions.
